symbols: two rectangular panels — possibly the duality of the Annunciation: the divine message and Mary's response
vertical black stripes — abstracted architectural or figural elements
description: Two rectangular panels placed side by side on cream-colored paper. Each panel contains alternating vertical stripes of black and white. The left panel has the pattern white-black-black-white, while the right panel mirrors or reverses this arrangement as white-black-black-white. The stripes are rendered in soft graphite or ink, with slightly uneven edges. The composition is strictly minimalist and geometric.
